## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce participants to AI-powered workflow creation using AirOps and provide hands-on experience building basic workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The workshop aims to inspire participants to invest time in becoming "AI native" by learning to build and apply AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Key concepts covered: identifying use cases, decomposing tasks, prompt engineering, and leveraging different AI models](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Hands-on practice focused on building a basic prospect research workflow using web scraping and AI-powered analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Participants given access to AirOps sandbox environment with pre-built templates to explore further](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Introduction and Workshop Overview

  - [Fourth cohort of this workshop, with over 130 previous participants](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Today's focus: Setting foundation, showcasing possibilities, hands-on workflow building](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Next week: Deeper dive into advanced concepts and techniques](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

### Identifying AI Use Cases

  - [Look for time-consuming tasks, repetitive work, high-impact areas](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Consider tasks you'd do if you had more time/resources](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Analyze calendar to identify opportunities for automation](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Think about leveraging unique data/knowledge your company has](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Fundamentals of AI Workflows

  - [Key components: Inputs, processing steps, variables, planning, critics/adapters, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Importance of decomposing tasks and taking a first principles approach](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Balance between automation and human review/input](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)

### AirOps Platform Overview

  - [Core components: Workflows, Grids, Knowledge Bases](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [Types of workflow steps: LLMs, code, conditionals, human review, data operations](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)
  - [Importance of variables for reusability and maintainability](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)

### Hands-on Workflow Building

  - [Built a basic prospect research workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2778.0)
    1.  Web scraping of prospect's website
    2.  AI-powered research using Perplexity
    3.  Composing a prospect brief using GPT-4
  - [Demonstrated iterative improvement of prompts and outputs](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
  - [Showcased more advanced workflows (e.g. sales email generation, content strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)

### AI Model Considerations

  - [Perplexity: Real-time info, but API limitations](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3239.0)
  - [GPT-4: Versatile workhorse](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3249.0)
  - [Claude: Strong performance, good for specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3259.0)
  - [Anthropic AI One Preview: Longer outputs, but slower and more expensive](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3260.0)

### Additional Examples and Q\&A

  - [Daniel demonstrated a sentiment analysis workflow for client calls](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
  - [Discussed integration possibilities (e.g. Zapier, custom API calls)](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3518.0)
  - [Addressed questions on data privacy, account setup, and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=3525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Participants encouraged to spend 3+ hours exploring AirOps sandbox before next session](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=9922.0)
  - [Review provided templates and experiment with building custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=9955.0)
  - [Post questions and progress updates in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=10009.0)
  - [Prepare for deeper dive and more advanced topics in next week's session](https://fathom.video/share/Lg2RdgWaCqsmFKmfZ7QooDnZ5EcWXMks?tab=summary&timestamp=10002.0)
